description: PuroR is the Streptomyces alboniger puromycin N-acetyltransferase (PAC), a 199-aa GNAT-family enzyme that inactivates puromycin by N-acetylation and serves as a dominant selectable marker.

references.authors: Lacalle RA, Pulido D, Vara J, Zalacain M, Jimenez A
references.title: Molecular analysis of the pac gene encoding a puromycin N-acetyltransferase from Streptomyces alboniger

references.authors: Vara J, Portela A, Ortin J, Jimenez A
references.title: Expression in mammalian cells of a gene from Streptomyces alboniger conferring puromycin resistance

references.authors: Caputo AT, Eder OM, Bereznakova H, Pothuis H, Ardevol A, Newman J, Nuttall S, Peat TS, Adams TE
references.title: Structure-guided selection of puromycin N-acetyltransferase mutants with enhanced selection stringency for deriving mammalian cell lines expressing recombinant proteins

label: PuroR
note: PuroR is the Streptomyces alboniger puromycin N-acetyltransferase (PAC), a 199-aa GNAT-family enzyme that inactivates puromycin by N-acetylation and serves as a dominant selectable marker.

functional_claims.label: Confers puromycin resistance by N-acetylation (puromycin N-acetyltransferase).

source.quote: PuroR is the Streptomyces alboniger puromycin N-acetyltransferase (PAC), a 199-aa GNAT-family enzyme that inactivates puromycin by N-acetylation and serves as a dominant selectable marker.
